tickets.subject: How long do refunds take?
tickets.body: Hi, I returned a shirt last week. When can I expect the money back on my iDEAL? Thanks, Anna.

tickets.subject: Where is my desk lamp?
tickets.body: I ordered a walnut desk lamp on Oct 1 (order ORD-10002). Tracking says in transit but it's been days. Can you check?

tickets.subject: Bag arrived with torn strap
tickets.body: Bonjour, the leather tote I received yesterday (ORD-10008) has a torn strap. I attached photos. I'd like a refund please — I don't want a replacement.

tickets.subject: Do you ship to Iceland?
tickets.body: Hi — do you ship to Iceland and roughly how long would standard shipping take? Also, would I pay any customs?

tickets.subject: Where is my cardigan? Tracking shows nothing
tickets.body: It's been almost 3 weeks since I ordered the grey cardigan (ORD-10004). The Royal Mail page hasn't updated since late September. Can you please refund or send a replacement?

tickets.subject: Headphones stopped working
tickets.body: I bought a pair of wireless headphones (ORD-10010) back in August. The right earcup has stopped producing sound. They're still within warranty I assume. What can I do?

tickets.subject: Can I still cancel?
tickets.body: Hi, I just placed an order — ORD-10025 — for the black wireless headphones. Can I cancel before it ships? I changed my mind.

tickets.subject: Order PKZ-77 not arrived
tickets.body: I ordered something a couple of weeks ago, order number PKZ-77, and it never came. Please help.

tickets.subject: Return policy question — bought as gift
tickets.body: Hi, I bought a leather crossbody bag (ORD-10003) as a birthday gift. The recipient doesn't love the colour. Can they return it themselves, or does it need to go through me? It's still within 30 days of delivery.

tickets.subject: Refund + compensation for late delivery
tickets.body: My order ORD-10017 arrived a week late and one of the candles was broken. I want a full refund AND store credit as compensation for the delay. I am extremely unhappy.

tickets.subject: Has my refund been processed?
tickets.body: I returned a linen shirt (ORD-10015) and want to confirm the refund went through. Nothing in my account yet.

tickets.subject: How do I care for the leather tote?
tickets.body: I just got the black leather tote (ORD-10026) and love it. How should I care for it long-term to keep it looking good?

tickets.subject: Want to return a shirt from August
tickets.body: Hola — I want to return the linen shirt from ORD-10030. I know it's past 30 days but I just never got round to it. Can you make an exception and refund me?

tickets.subject: URGENT: I think my account was hacked
tickets.body: Someone changed my email and shipping address on my account. I didn't do it. There may be an order placed that isn't mine. Please help, I'm panicking.
